title: messages-v1
description: Messaging platform contract v1 — 10 operations across conversations, messages, contacts, and delivery.

operations.name: messages
operations.description: Get messages from a conversation with pagination

operations.name: chat
operations.description: Get a specific conversation by ID or contact identifier

operations.name: stats
operations.description: Aggregate statistics (message counts, date ranges, top contacts)

operations.name: send
operations.description: Send a text message to a contact or conversation

operations.name: send_file
operations.description: Send a file attachment to a contact or conversation
